title: The Counterfeiters of Paris
writer: Michel Audiard, Gilles Grangier, Albert Simonin
actors: Jean Gabin, Martine Carol, Françoise Rosay
plot: "Le Dabe" retired many years ago and now he lives in the Tropics where he owns stables and horses. He is a very rich man. He was the king of all money counterfeiters. He is contacted from Paris to organize a new job. He says no. B...
